{{Quote|Double-time! It went down this way! ''MOVE!''<nowiki></nowiki>|The clone stormtrooper|<ref name="Purge" />}}
A '''clone stormtrooper''' served as a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone trooper commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] under the [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]] [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]]. After the execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]—a [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|mandate]] instructing [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to eliminate their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]]—the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]], now a [[clone stormtrooper]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], hunted down Choi on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] with the assistance of three other [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]]. There, Choi [[Skirmish on Eriadu (Great Jedi Purge)|ambushed]] the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] and quickly [[Death/Legends|killed]] the stormtrooper's companions before [[Sai cha/Legends|beheading]] [[Gender/Legends|him]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Blast! Where did it go?|The clone stormtrooper, upon losing Tsui Choi's trail|<ref name="Purge" />}}
[[File:BattleofEriadu.jpg|thumb|left|200px|The clone trooper officer's death]]
A [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commander]],<ref name="Hasbro">{{Hasbro|subdomain=www|url=starwars/en_US/discover/news/article.cfm?newsid=7CB0F60C-D56F-E112-486387240F17C6EE|text=Target Store Exclusive Order 66 Series 2 at Hasbro.com|nobackup=1}}</ref> like all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], was a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].<ref name="clone troopers" /> During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Gender/Legends|he]] served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]<ref name="Purge" /> under the [[Aleena/Legends|Aleena]] [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Tsui Choi/Legends|Tsui Choi]].<ref name="Hasbro" /> In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="TNEC" /> [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]—a mandate instructing the clone [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] to kill their [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]]—was issued,<ref name="ROTS">{{Film|III}}</ref> the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] was [[Declaration of a New Order|founded]], and the clone [[Troop/Legends|trooper]] personnel formerly of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] were dubbed Imperial [[clone stormtrooper]]s.<ref name="Republic Holonet 16524">{{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}}</ref>

A [[Standard month/Legends|month]] following the execution of Order 66, the clone [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] tracked Choi, who had survived Order 66, to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]. After noticing tracks on the ground in the deeper levels of the world, the stormtrooper and three other clones trailed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] until they were in a dead-end alley with no sign of their prey. When a subordinate of his asked about the need of their mission, the stormtrooper dictated that Order 66 remained in effect. However, the clones were suddenly [[Skirmish on Eriadu (Great Jedi Purge)|attacked]] from behind by Choi, who quickly [[Death/Legends|killed]] the three companions of the stormtrooper before [[Sai cha/Legends|beheading]] the commander himself, killing him.<ref name="Purge" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Order 66 remains in effect. We see one, we kill it. Same as the rest.|The clone stormtrooper, regarding rogue Jedi|<ref name="Purge" />}}
As a stormtrooper, the clone showed his devotion to the Empire by following his orders, determinedly tracking down Choi on Eriadu. The commander was equipped with [[Phase II clone trooper armor/Legends|clone trooper armor]], a [[Kama/Legends|''kama'']] [[Pauldron/WeLegends|pauldron]], polarized [[Macrobinoculars/Legends|macrobinoculars]], a [[DC-15S/Legends|DC-15S]], and a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]].<ref name="Purge" /> Like all Jango Fett clones,<ref name="clone troopers" /> the stormtrooper stood 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] tall.<ref name="SWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
The clone stormtrooper appeared in the one-shot [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Purge (comic book)|''Purge'']], written by [[John Ostrander]] and colored by [[Ronda Pattison]]. ''Purge'' was published on [[December 28]], [[2005]].<ref name="Purge" />
